title: Truth | Catmageddon
summary: Cats are twice as likely to get cancer if their owner smokes. No cats means no cat videos, which means the end of the internet as we know it. We called it Catmageddon.
body: Everyone knows smoking is bad. Not everyone knows it's bad for their pets. Cats are twice as likely to develop cancer if their owner smokes, and no cats means no cat videos, which means the end of the internet as we know it. We called it Catmageddon.

To spread the message, we asked teens to retweet to unlock 'the most epic cat video ever,' a custom film by internet star Aaron's Animals. We partnered with Adult Swim on their first-ever five-part micro-series, Cat Dick Mysteries, starring a cat private detective trying to solve the case of the vanishing cats.
Twitch ran a live activation on their platform to push the idea even further, turning a public health story into something teens actually wanted to watch and share.
